description.en: Play the Antiquarian if you want to use information to bolster your allies.
After an adversary is spotlighted, you may **spend a Hope** to make the target *Vulnerable* until the next time it takes damage.
When an ally attempts a Knowledge roll, that ally may use your Knowledge modifier instead of their own.
Whenever an ally strikes a Vulnerable adversary with an attack, you can **spend a Hope** to add a d6 to the damage roll.
You pull an ancient relic from your pocket and pass it to an ally. As you do, you both feel the aura it gives off. If you are involved in a tag team roll, you and your ally both roll with advantage.
Play the Inquisitor if you want to use religion to relentlessly pursue adversaries.
Gain a calculated bonus +1 to your Armor Score.
If an adversary within Close range attempts to leave that range, you can **mark a Stress** to react and move within Very Close range of them after their movement is complete.
If an adversary within Close range attempts to leave that range, you can **mark a Stress** to react and move within Very Close range of them after their movement is complete.
When you would move within Very Close range of an adversary as a result of a reaction, you may make an attack against that adversary.
